response.justification: Candidate has well over a decade of full-stack experience with strong overlap on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architectural breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps align well with the senior IC profile. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java depth for backend services, and explicit cloud platform breadth beyond AWS, but these are reasonable to probe in interview rather than disqualifying.
strengths: Direct AI-agent/MCP tooling experience in current role aligns with a key requirement
Deep full-stack background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python exposure not evidenced; Java appears only in older robotics/tooling work
Significant portion of recent backend depth is in DLang rather than the target JVM/TS ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited Kotlin/Python evidence
